tags_v2.on_screen_text: Yellow Beeswax, Soy wax flakes 4 lb / 1.8 kg, scale display ~41

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead-ish shot on a white countertop: a clear glass bowl filled with white soy wax flakes sits on a black digital kitchen scale reading roughly 41 (oz); a yellow Yellow Beeswax bag stands to the right.
Same scene, bowl of white wax flakes on the digital scale; scale display shows the same weight; beeswax bag on right unchanged.
Bowl of wax flakes on scale; very slight shift, an object begins entering from the left edge.
A printed soy-wax-flake product box (labeled '4 lb / 1.8 kg' with colored pillar candles on the front) slides in from the left next to the scale.
The wax flake box is now fully visible on the left, the bowl of flakes still centered on the digital scale, beeswax bag still on the right.
The product box recedes slightly, scale and bowl of wax flakes remain in frame as the demonstrator references the materials.
Box has been pulled further out of frame; bowl of white soy wax flakes sits on the digital scale, beeswax bag to the right.
Box exits left; clean shot of the glass bowl of wax flakes on the digital scale with beeswax bag at right.
Final composition: bowl of white soy wax flakes resting on the black digital scale, Yellow Beeswax bag to the right, white counter background.

windows.embed_text_v2: weighing beeswax: pouring yellow beeswax pastilles from a bag into a clear glass bowl on a black digital kitchen scale, stainless steel pitcher nearby, white countertop, measuring out four ounces
windows.summary_v2: A maker weighs out yellow beeswax pastilles by pouring them from a bag into a glass bowl on a digital kitchen scale.

seconds_v2.desc: Empty glass bowl sits on a black digital kitchen scale; a stainless steel pouring pitcher is at left and a bag of beeswax pastilles waits at right.
A hand tilts the bag of yellow beeswax pastilles toward the bowl, preparing to pour onto the tared scale.
Hand steadies the bag over the still-empty glass bowl on the scale, scale reading near zero.
First yellow beeswax pastilles begin tumbling from the bag into the glass bowl as the scale starts to register weight.
Beeswax pastilles pour into the bowl, partly covering the bottom; the scale's digital readout climbs.
Steady stream of yellow pastilles fills the bowl further while the scale display increases.
Bowl is now half-filled with yellow beeswax pastilles as pouring continues and the scale nears the target weight.
Pouring slows; the bowl holds a mounded layer of beeswax pastilles, scale reading roughly four ounces.
Hand lifts the emptying bag away; bowl of weighed yellow beeswax pastilles rests on the scale beside the steel pitcher.
